narrative:
Huber Heights 3-C (precinct in Montgomery County) has 818 registered voters, with 62.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.6%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.8 percentage points.
